use thiserror::Error;

#[derive(Error, Debug)]
pub enum AuthError {
    #[error("authentication failed for token: {token}")]
    InvalidToken { token: String },

    #[error("invalid credentials: password={password}")]
    InvalidCredentials { password: String },

    #[error("session expired, secret={session_secret}")]
    SessionExpired { session_secret: String },

    #[error("API key rejected: {api_key}")]
    ApiKeyRejected { api_key: String },

    #[error("cookie validation failed: {cookie_value}")]
    InvalidCookie { cookie_value: String },

    #[error("credential mismatch: auth={auth_token}")]
    CredentialMismatch { auth_token: String },
}
